heading: Service schools: leaves of absence for instructors
label: 7406 Service schools: leaves of absence for instructors
text: The officer in charge of an Army service school may grant a leave of absence for the period of the suspension of the ordinary academic studies, without reduction of pay or allowances, to any officer on duty exclusively as an instructor at the school.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)430610:843.(proviso under “United States Service Schools”), .Mar. 23, 1910, ch. 11536 Stat. 244The words “The provisions of , authorizing leaves of absence to certain officers of the Military Academy * * * are hereby, extended to include” are omitted as surplusage.section 1144 of this title
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4306 of this title
